question: Could a nymph tick pass through a standard hole punch?
context: A nymph tick is the size of a poppy seed.
A poppy seed is around 1mm in size.
The ISO 838 standards set a hole punch size at 6 mm.
response:
<reasoning>
A nymph tick is the size of a poppy seed.
A poppy seed is around 1mm in size.
A standard hole punch has a hole size of 6 mm according to ISO 838 standards.
1mm is smaller than 6mm.
A nymph tick is smaller than the hole size of a standard hole punch.
A nymph tick could pass through a standard hole punch.
<answer> Yes
claims: A nymph tick is the size of a poppy seed
A poppy seed is around 1mm in size
A standard hole punch has a hole size of 6 mm according to ISO 838 standards
A nymph tick is smaller than the hole size of a standard hole punch
A nymph tick could pass through a standard hole punch
